name: schema-registry-dag-schema-compatibility-checker
description: T193 SchemaCompatibilityChecker — VALIDATION archetype (inline). Validates field-level compatibility against published schemas. Returns compatibility score.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: field-level compatibility against published schemas, compatibility score output, inline call contract from T189
Retrieve VALIDATION arch pattern + field-compatibility + compatibility-score + schema-diff patterns for T193
Break T193 into: load published schema by schemaId → diff fields → classify field changes → compute compatibility score → return score with field-level diff report

Generate schema-compatibility-checker.service.ts — checkCompatibility(newSchema, existingSchemaId) reads PINNED published schema from DATABASE, performs field-level diff, computes score 0.0–1.0. NEVER reads 'latest' — always pinned version. Returns CompatibilityResult with score and field diff. Called inline at T189 step 5.
Named check validation: reads_pinned_version_not_latest, field_level_diff_performed, compatibility_score_0_to_1, returns_field_diff_report, inline_call_compliant
Score generated code 0-100 against T193 iron rules: pinned version read, field-level diff, score range compliance, no latest-version reference
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=pinned-version-read+field-level-diff+score-0-to-1, rejected=latest-version-read OR no-field-diff OR binary-compatible-flag-only. curriculumTier=1.
